headline: 'So Far And So Fast': Stock Market Update For The Week Ahead
summary:
The Past Week, In A Nutshell

What Happened: “A sell-off had become inevitable because the market had come so far and so fast, and because it involved pricing for perfection,” said John Authers, a Bloomberg Opinion columnist.

headline: The Week Ahead In Biotech: FDA Decisions In The Cards For Merck, Epizyme, Evoke And Ultragenyx
summary: Biotech stocks came under pressure along with the broader market in the week ended June 12, as a worsening pandemic situation and its impact on the economy led to an across-the-board sell-off in the global markets.

headline: Barron's Picks And Pans: Chevron, Goldman Sachs, Progressive And More
summary:
This weekend's Barron's cover story features eight dividend stock picks for the pandemic era.
	Other featured articles look at what younger day traders are favoring and why some tech giants riding high.

headline: All The Stocks In A Hot New Sector: Thermal Imaging
summary: Thermal imaging stocks have gotten a lot of attention in 2020 due to the product's potential role in detecting people who may be infected with COVID-19. These devices are playing a role in allowing companies to safely reopen businesses as the economy recovers, but thermal imaging also has a wide range of other applications that could generate some big long-term gains for investors.
